pundit.name: Eric Wynalda
pundit.take: **Mustard Boy might as well hang up his cleats—this isn't FIFA, Zach, it's the real world.** Look, if you thought drafting Saudi Arabia would win you this pool, you're lost. Maybe see if there's a fantasy camel league you can join instead. Rafe, aka "The Noisemaker," somehow managed to draft three teams that didn't even qualify. It's impressive in a pitying kind of way. And Gayden, "The Backpass Assassin," your squad is slower than molasses in the winter. England's perpetually overrated, and Jordan? Really? Ask yourself if you picked names you recognize from video games, because your strategy screams ignorance. Gunner, or "Bubba G," is the clear top dog here, riding high with France and Senegal. Devin's Spain might challenge Gunner, but the rest of you are just amateur hour. You wouldn't last a minute in a real locker room.

pundit_takes.headline: Gunner's Dominance Confirmed as France Dismantles Norway in Group Play
pundit_takes.subtitle: The strategic brilliance in drafting Tier 1 talent pays off again.

pundit_takes.headline: Mustard Boy's Austria Poised for Victory Against Undrafted Algeria
pundit_takes.subtitle: Zach's fourth-place standing suggests he might finally taste success.

pundit_takes.headline: The Backpass Assassin Bet on England to Deliver Against Panama
pundit_takes.subtitle: Gayden's fifth-place rank hangs in the balance with this matchup.

pundit_takes.headline: Ghost Pepper Heats Up Standings as Spain Edges Uruguay
pundit_takes.subtitle: Devin closes the gap, trailing standings leader Gunner by two points.

rome_analytics_quotes: Gunner skyrockets from 5th to 1st in one matchday. Gunner's world, we're just living in it.
Rafe drafted three teams that aren't even in the World Cup. Rookie mistakes much?
Rafe crushes Devin by 6 points, proving chaos agents can cause real damage.
Sim can't handle a 15-year-old, yet claims Gunner is the top dog. Laughable.
